auth.label: Personal Access Token
auth.description: GitHub personal access token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create or manage it at https://docs.github.com/en/authentication/keeping-your-account-and-data-secure/managing-your-personal-access-tokens.

actions.name: check_gist_starred
actions.description: Check whether the authenticated GitHub user has starred a gist.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for checking gist star state.

starred.description: Whether the authenticated user has starred the gist.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for checking gist star state.

actions.name: create_gist
actions.description: Create a new GitHub gist.

description.description: The description to store on the gist.

public.description: Whether the gist should be publicly visible.

content.description: The text content for the new gist file.

additionalProperties.description: The input for creating a gist file.

files.description: The files to create in the gist, keyed by filename.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a gist.

id.description: The unique identifier of the gist.

url.description: The API URL of the gist.

forks_url.description: The API URL for listing gist forks.

commits_url.description: The API URL for listing gist commits.

node_id.description: The global node ID of the gist.

git_pull_url.description: The git pull URL for the gist.

git_push_url.description: The git push URL for the gist.

html_url.description: The HTML URL of the gist.

files.description: The files contained in the gist, keyed by filename.

public.description: Whether the gist is publicly visible.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp of the gist.

updated_at.description: The last updated timestamp of the gist.

comments.description: The number of comments on the gist.

comments_url.description: The API URL for listing gist comments.

comments_enabled.description: Whether comments are enabled on the gist.

login.description: The GitHub username of the gist owner.

node_id.description: The global node ID of the user.

avatar_url.description: The URL of the user avatar image.

html_url.description: The HTML URL of the user profile.

url.description: The API URL of the user.

type.description: The account type of the user.

site_admin.description: Whether the user is a GitHub site administrator.

truncated.description: Whether the gist content was truncated.

forks.description: The list of forks for the gist.

history.description: The commit history of the gist.

outputSchema.description: A gist summary record.

actions.description: Create a comment on a GitHub gist.

body.description: The body text of the comment.

updated_at.description: The last updated timestamp of the comment.

node_id.description: The global node ID of the user.

avatar_url.description: The URL of the user avatar image.

html_url.description: The HTML URL of the user profile.

url.description: The API URL of the user.

type.description: The account type of the user.

site_admin.description: Whether the user is a GitHub site administrator.

outputSchema.description: A gist comment record.
